# Generative AI Agent Runtime

Manage OCI Generative AI Agent Runtime sessions from Kubernetes with a reviewed synchronous controller-backed runtime.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `generativeaiagentruntime` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-generativeaiagentruntime-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-generativeaiagentruntime:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-generativeaiagentruntime-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |

## Notes

- Current package scope is intentionally limited to Session while Chat and the broader conversational, retrieval, and trace helper families stay unpublished.
- The published runtime keeps explicit `agentEndpointId + sessionId` path identity, uses synchronous read-after-write follow-up semantics, and does not invent list-based bind or search behavior because the SDK exposes no `ListSessions` operation.
- The published package keeps `generativeaiagentruntime/Session` explicitly distinct from the existing `bastion/Session` rollout in docs, catalog metadata, and formal/runtime surfaces.
- No checked-in release manifest currently lists this package; the resource scope below reflects the current repository package metadata.
- This package is currently hidden from the Supported Resources landing page until a checked-in release manifest promotes it to the customer-visible surface.
